meaning: n.薄泥浆,水泥浆vt.用薄泥浆填塞,(猪等)用鼻子拱
examples: For tile work, a very thin mortar called grout is used.
Grout placement and vent holes should be provided if necessary.
Tiles. Check tiles and grout and touch up/repair where there are cracks or pitting.
At a minimum, spend an hour with a toothbrush and some bleach and scrub that grout.
And ever since then, engineers have been kind of been injecting this dam with something called grout.
